title: Capability
description: A named, versioned unit of executable functionality registered in agent-kernel. Capabilities have stable IDs and declared input/output schema references.

id.description: Stable, unique identifier for this capability. Should be namespaced (e.g., 'org.myapp.search_docs').

description.description: Concise description of what this capability does and when to use it.

input_schema_ref.description: Optional URI reference to the JSON Schema describing valid inputs for this capability.

output_schema_ref.description: Optional URI reference to the JSON Schema describing the output Frame content for this capability.

tags.description: Optional tags for categorization and discovery.
